reviews.feedback: no need to call twice, using cvss score could be done in one call. Nice that it included the synopsys of the CVE
nice optimization only making one call. It would be nice to include the synopsys of the CVE
better user facing than with the old skill. Also I like more the follow up options given
it would be nice to have the systems sorted by some of the fields, either name or OS
nice that it order the results based on the name
